title: Design System: Annoying Winter Pressure Fold

display.purpose: Hero, Impact, and Contact statements only.

headline.purpose: Chapter and anatomy titles with authored line breaks.

body.purpose: English and Chinese support copy held to readable line lengths.

label.purpose: Navigation, modes, state readouts, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: contact-legibility
shadows.purpose: Keeps the final support sentence readable when the live material crosses behind it.

shadows.name: material-contact-field
shadows.purpose: Anchors Pressure Fold to the chamber and follows the camera target.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Primary response curve for copy, links, modes, and state changes.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Zone color and scene-shadow state changes.

motion.name: canvas-crossfade
motion.purpose: Transfers the scene from the static poster to the first successful WebGL frame.

motion.name: method-shift
motion.purpose: Moves the current method word while preserving readable defaults.

motion.name: scan-pass
motion.purpose: A single restrained reflection pass across the chamber; removed under reduced motion.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Collapses decorative animation and transition duration while preserving all content.

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: Two-level identity lockup for the fixed chamber header.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { display: grid; width: fit-content; gap: .05rem; color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .02em; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; } .ds-wordmark small { color: var(--ink-faint, oklch(64% 0.016 235)); font-size: .52rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .14em; } .ds-wordmark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); outline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Navigation Row
components.description: Transparent navigation with a directional one-pixel state line.
components.html: FieldAnatomyContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2.75rem); } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: flex-start; color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(73% 0.018 235)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .7rem; letter-spacing: .06em; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1); } .ds-nav-link::after { position: absolute; right: 0; bottom: .65rem; left: 0; height: 1px; background: currentColor; content: ''; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right; transition: transform 240ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible, .ds-nav-link-current { color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible::after, .ds-nav-link-current::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); outline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Directional Action Link
components.description: Primary inline action used to enter the material study and open the final contact path.
components.css: .ds-action { display: inline-flex; min-height: 3rem; width: fit-content; align-items: center; gap: 1.2rem; border-bottom: 1px solid currentColor; color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .07em; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1), gap 220ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1); } .ds-action:hover, .ds-action:focus-visible { gap: 1.7rem; color: var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); } .ds-action:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); outline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Material Modes
components.description: Keyboard-operable Surface, Stress, and Structure selector.
components.css: .ds-modes { display: flex; gap: 1.6rem; } .ds-mode { position: relative; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--ink-faint, oklch(64% 0.016 235)); cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .07em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1); } .ds-mode::after { position: absolute; right: 0; bottom: .45rem; left: 0; height: 1px; background: var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); content: ''; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1); } .ds-mode:hover, .ds-mode:focus-visible, .ds-mode-selected { color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); } .ds-mode-selected::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; } .ds-mode:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); outline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Stage Status
components.description: Instrumentation line connecting narrative state to total page progress.
components.css: .ds-status { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(8rem, 1fr) auto; align-items: center; width: min(100%, 48rem); gap: 1rem; color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .58rem; letter-spacing: .11em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-status > span:last-child { color: var(--ink-faint, oklch(64% 0.016 235)); text-align: right; } .ds-status i { position: relative; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; background: color-mix(in oklch, currentColor 22%, transparent); } .ds-status b { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: currentColor; transform: scaleX(.62); transform-origin: left; }

components.name: Material Specification
components.description: Open ruled definition list for project facts without a card container.
components.css: .ds-spec { display: grid; max-width: 34rem; margin: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(32% 0.022 235)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); } .ds-spec > div { display: grid; grid-template-columns: .7fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding-block: .8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(32% 0.022 235)); } .ds-spec dt { color: var(--ink-faint, oklch(64% 0.016 235)); font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-spec dd { margin: 0; color: var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .03em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Pressure Fold Poster
components.description: Static five-layer fallback that preserves the signature silhouette without WebGL2.
components.css: .ds-fold { position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center; width: min(70vw, 42rem); min-width: 18rem; height: 18rem; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg, oklch(10% 0.015 245)); } .ds-fold i { position: absolute; width: 76%; height: 28%; background: oklch(18% 0.02 245); clip-path: polygon(0 28%, 18% 4%, 47% 18%, 67% 0, 100% 24%, 78% 72%, 54% 100%, 28% 80%, 4% 96%); transform: rotate(-12deg) translateY(-24px); } .ds-fold i:nth-child(2) { background: oklch(23% 0.035 270); transform: rotate(-9deg) translateY(-12px); } .ds-fold i:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(12% 0.02 245); transform: rotate(-6deg); } .ds-fold i:nth-child(4) { background: oklch(31% 0.035 245 / .72); transform: rotate(-3deg) translateY(12px); } .ds-fold i:nth-child(5) { height: 3px; background: var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); clip-path: none; transform: rotate(-6deg); }

components.name: Skip Link
components.description: High-contrast keyboard entry point to the main narrative.
components.css: .ds-skip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: .75rem 1rem; background: var(--signal, oklch(88% 0.205 116)); color: var(--signal-ink, oklch(16% 0.04 118)); font-family: var(--font, sans-serif); font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 800; text-decoration: none; } .ds-skip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ink, oklch(95% 0.006 235)); outline-offset: 5px; }

narrative.overview:
Annoying Winter behaves like a low-temperature material test filmed as a silent title sequence. A single black-chrome composite fold occupies the fixed stage while the page moves through Edge, Fold, Stress, Rupture, Anatomy, Release, and Rest. Each chapter changes the same object's silhouette, camera, material response, or structural state, so the full scroll reads as one authored experiment.

The interface is visceral, cinematic, and exact. Deep blue-black space, cold white type, and one sulfur signal color create controlled tension. Sticky copy, hard tonal inversion, pointer pressure, deterministic scroll states, and restrained labels support the object without competing with it. The visual system rejects interchangeable portfolio templates, decorative UI chrome, invented proof, and borrowed MDX identity.
keyCharacteristics: One persistent Pressure Fold object across the entire narrative, including a rendered five-layer anatomy cut.
One dark visual world with a single full-field sulfur impact.
Condensed display typography capped at 5.75rem with tight, readable spacing.
Open layouts built from sticky stages, ruled information, and controlled negative space.
Native WebGL2 as progressive enhancement, backed by a composed static poster.
Deterministic motion, keyboard-operable modes, reduced-motion cuts, and 320px support.

rules.name: The Escalation Rule
rules.body: Every fold must reveal a new property, increase tension, or resolve the previous state. A chapter that merely repeats the last composition is prohibited.

rules.name: The One Object Rule
rules.body: Pressure Fold carries the full experience. Additional spheres, blobs, or unrelated 3D toys are forbidden.

rules.name: The One Impact Rule
rules.body: The sulfur field may dominate one narrative interval only. Everywhere else it remains a seam, state, focus, or short emphasis.

rules.name: The Same-Hue Neutral Rule
rules.body: Supporting grays remain blue-tinted so they retain density on the dark field. Generic neutral gray is prohibited.

rules.name: The Compression Rule
rules.body: Display letter spacing stops at -0.03em. Tighter settings and oversized 96px-plus headlines are prohibited.

rules.name: The Unequal Languages Rule
rules.body: English and Chinese carry complementary information. Literal line-by-line duplication is prohibited.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: Geometry, occlusion, light, and camera position create depth. Decorative box shadows and default glass blur are forbidden.

dos: Do preserve one persistent Pressure Fold and make every state change readable in silhouette.
Do reserve the sulfur signal for stress, focus, selected states, decisive words, and one full-field Impact interval.
Do keep display type at or below 5.75rem with letter spacing no tighter than -0.03em.
Do use sticky stages, asymmetric placement, open ruled lists, and varied vertical pacing.
Do keep native HTML, CSS, JavaScript, WebGL2, self-hosted fonts, and relative GitHub Pages assets free of third-party runtime dependencies.
Do maintain visible focus, 44px or larger touch targets, semantic landmarks, reduced-motion behavior, static WebGL fallback, and legibility at 320px.
Do label speculative work honestly and keep client, award, testimonial, and performance claims verifiable.
donts: Don't recreate generic AI portfolios built from a large grotesque headline, one particle sphere, orange-on-black, and repeated bordered panels.
Don't use repeated tiny uppercase section kickers, decorative 01/02/03 scaffolding, orbit diagrams, grid-paper backgrounds, or typography used as filler.
Don't ship a dark studio site that relies on glow, blur, or a single WebGL object while the rest of the page becomes static.
Don't invent clients, awards, testimonials, performance claims, or case-study metrics.
Don't fall back to safe editorial restraint, beige or cream themes, SaaS card grammar, stock-template transitions, or any composition that could be reproduced by changing only the logo.
Don't copy MDX layouts, wording, assets, models, brand identity, or HorizonX premium prompt text.
Don't add gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, identical card grids, wide soft card shadows, oversized corner radii, or universal fade-up reveals.
Don't hide essential content behind JavaScript, pointer precision, color alone, or successful WebGL initialization.
